narrative:
Nelsonville 2 (precinct in Athens County) has 407 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.8 percentage points.
